rules: Headings must use Playfair Display with tracking-tight (-0.025em to -0.05em).
Body text must use Inter with generous line-height (leading-relaxed).
Labels and overlines must be Uppercase, tiny (text-xs), and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight text-[#1C1C1E]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight text-[#1C1C1E]
hierarchy.caption: text-sm font-sans text-[#1C1C1E]/60
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-[#7C9E7E] font-medium

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Editorial Alignment. Treat whitespace as a luxury.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: Asymmetrical grids for photo uploads. Instead of equal squares, use a primary large square and smaller supporting squares.
spacing_and_layout.card_stack: Tinder-style stack. Active card z-index 10. Background cards scale down (0.95, 0.9) and translate Y (16px, 32px). Absolute positioning within a relative container taking 70vh on desktop.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7C9E7E] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#6A8A6C] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F0F0ED] text-[#1C1C1E] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#E5E5E0] transition-colors
buttons.icon_action_heart: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center text-[#C9908A] hover:scale-110 transition-transform
buttons.icon_action_dismiss: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center text-[#1C1C1E] hover:scale-110 transition-transform

cards.swipe_card: bg-white rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(28,28,30,0.08)] overflow-hidden border border-[#E5E5E0]/50

inputs.vibe_input: w-full bg-transparent border-b-2 border-[#E5E5E0] py-4 text-xl font-serif focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C9E7E] placeholder:text-[#1C1C1E]/30 transition-colors resize-none

motion.swipe_animation: Use framer-motion drag='x' with dragConstraints. Animate rotate and opacity based on x offset.
motion.page_transitions: Fade and gentle upward slide (y: 20 -> 0) for new elements.
motion.loading_state: Editorial loading state: smooth pulsing opacity on a centered logo, with a cycling array of text ('Analyzing your vibe...', 'Steaming the fabrics...', 'Curating your look...').

hero_fashion.description: Minimalist fashion woman, used for landing page hero or onboarding visual.

clothing_flatlay_1.description: Clothes laying on bed, used for clothing upload examples.

clothing_flatlay_2.description: Pile of clothes, used for clothing upload examples.

outfit_result_1.description: Fashion result image for swipe card 1.

outfit_result_2.description: Fashion result image for swipe card 2.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `framer-motion`, `lucide-react`, and update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and fonts (Playfair Display for serif, Inter for sans).
Set the global background to `#FAFAF8` and text to `#1C1C1E`.
Build the 3-step onboarding flow without complex routes if possible (just state transitions) to keep the SPA snappy. Steps: 1. Self Photo -> 2. Clothing Upload (Bento grid) -> 3. Vibe Input.
Implement the Tinder-style swipe interface using `framer-motion`'s `drag` properties. The active card is interactive, the cards behind it should have `scale: 0.95, y: 16` and `scale: 0.90, y: 32`.
The Swipe Card should contain: the generated image (taking up the top 60%), an explanation section 'Why It Works', and a row of small chips for the uploaded items used in the look.
Provide a 'Tweak Vibe' button that takes the user back to the vibe input step with their previous input pre-filled.
Add a 'Saved Looks' page showing a masonry or grid layout of outfits the user swiped right on.
Ensure the design remains 'clean, editorial, warm' — avoid techy borders, use soft shadows, large elegant typography, and generous whitespace.
Do NOT build Spotify integration, weather features, user accounts, social sharing, affiliate links, or Capsule Bridge.
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid`.
